title: sterculia macrophylla
intro: Sterculia macrophylla, also known as the great leaf tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sterculiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Sterculia macrophylla include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and can be used to treat a range of health issues.
